name: Fresh Asparagus with Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the asparagus until tender and set aside to keep warm.
2. Melt the butter in the top of a double boiler over hot water.
3. Blend in the flour using a wooden spoon.
4. Gradually add milk and half-and-half, stirring constantly.
5. Cook over low heat until the sauce is smooth and thick.
6. Reserve 1 tablespoon of egg; stir the remainder into the sauce and mix well.
7. Arrange the asparagus in a serving dish and sprinkle with lemon juice.
8. Pour the sauce into a gravy boat and sprinkle with the reserved egg.
